sections.changelog:
0.4.4

  • Add: DELETE /wp-json/postglider/v1/delete-site endpoint — accepts blog_id or domain, calls wpmu_delete_blog() with table drop; refuses to delete main site; treats already-deleted blog as success (idempotent)

0.4.3

  • Add: gallery page auto-redirects to SearchIQ results page with ?q=* so all images are visible on load without requiring a search query

0.4.2

  • Fix: write _thumbnail_id to wp_postmeta database row during sync so SearchIQ Full Resynchronize (which queries wp_postmeta directly via SQL, bypassing WordPress meta filters) can find the featured image for every stub post
  • Add: wp_get_attachment_url filter maps stub post IDs to Supabase URLs (covers SearchIQ URL resolution after finding _thumbnail_id in DB)
  • Add: one-time backfill migration writes _thumbnail_id for all existing pg_gallery_image posts that had _pg_image_url but no _thumbnail_id DB row

0.4.1

  • Fix: use response->remove_link() + add_link() to correctly override wp:featuredmedia href to wp/v2/media/{id} — previously $data['_links'] was silently ignored because WP_REST_Response keeps links in a separate property; the auto-generated link was pointing to pg_gallery_image/{id} instead of media/{id}, so _embed never hit the synthetic media intercept and SearchIQ never received source_url
  • Add: source_url now also injected as a flat field in the pg_gallery_image REST response

0.4.0

  • Fix: updater force-check works in network admin (manage_network_plugins capability)
  • Fix: Check for Updates button clears WordPress update_plugins transient
  • Add: Settings page in Network Admin

0.3.9

  • Fix: featured_media returns post's own positive ID so SearchIQ finds images
  • Fix: rest_pre_dispatch intercepts /wp/v2/media/{id} for stub posts
  • Add: siq-styles.php — facet min-height, image object-fit, hide empty placeholders

0.3.8

  • Add: pg_artist and pg_content_type taxonomies; sync-image accepts artist and content_type fields

0.3.7

  • Add: configure-site accepts searchiq_api_key; pg_setup_gallery_page inserts [searchiq] shortcode
